chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP NO.D-1955/2018 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 11.10.2021 Syed Ahsan Ali Shah advocate for petitioner. Mr. Sohail Hayat Khan Rana advocate Mr. Abdul Wahab Baloch, AAG................ At the outset learned counsel for petitioner and respondents are agreed that this petition may be disposed of in terms that Petitioner will prefer appeal with the competent authority and the appellate authority will decide the fate of that appeal within one month. Needless to mention that no delay shall be caused as Board has already decided Service Appeal No.1/2018 which is identical and on same footings as the case of the petitioner. Needles to mention that limitation shall not be considered against petitioner as petitioner filed this petition in 2008 and at that time was consumed here. J U D G E J U D G E IK
